author: Teacher Adam
content_raw: A short video to help understand the summer homework.

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

The summer homework has been issued today. The following is a message and attachment from the Grade 3 teachers.

🌟 GRADE 3 BILINGUAL SUMMER ASSIGNMENTS  🌟

Hello Parents, 
This summer, your child has two assignments: 
(1)  Read a nonfiction biography and complete the book report form
(2) Fill out the All About Me worksheet for the new homeroom 
teachers. 

Both are due on the first day of school. 

Kindly note that sample templates for the "All About Me" project are attached. These are provided to help you guide your child through the assignment.

📋 給家長的摘要
這個暑假，您的孩子有兩項作業：
（1） 閱讀一本非小說類傳記並完成讀書心得學習單
（2）填寫「關於我」的創意卡，讓新的中外班導師認識孩子。

兩項作業請於開學第一天交回。

另外，請參考隨附的「All About Me」的範本，以供您引導孩子完成此項作業。

Have a wonderful, restful, book-filled summer!

— Your Grade 3 Bilingual Team 2026-27

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Here a few notices regarding the end of the semester:

1. Science Books will be brought home tomorrow after school. They can stay at home.

2. Math WB homework books will be used in class on Thursday and then can remain at home.

3. English WB needs to be brought to school each day this week and will remain in school from Friday. I will stamp the books on Thursday so that they can be signed before they go up to the grade 3 classrooms.

4. Summer homework is being set by the grade 3 teachers. I understand that they will inform the children of the work set via Dojo.
 
5. Raz-Kids will expire after July 2026. Thank you for engaging with the program, and I hope it has encouraged the children to read more. Reading remains a key way of learning and reinforcing the English that the children know.

Have a great week,
Tr. Adam

content_raw:
2026 June 17th Wednesday 
1️⃣ 悅讀護照。（每天最少寫一本悅讀護照，並帶來學校！）
2️⃣ 整理書包。（所有中文簿本都要帶回家，不要再帶囉！大袋子每天都要帶來，我們會陸陸續續打包！）
3️⃣ 永和小日常繪畫比賽，八月底繳交。（今天發下畫紙，此活動自由參加，完成後請在八月繳交給三年級老師即可。）

Happy birthday 🎂🎉Kimi🎈

author: Teacher Patty
content_raw:
2026 June 15th Monday
1️⃣ 明天國、生期末考，加油。（明天國語和生活期末考，請確實準備好文具用品，早睡早起，不要遲到！）
2️⃣ 作文p52簽名。（請確實訂正整本作文，p52簽名後帶來學校給老師！）

🌟這學期的才藝課即將進入尾聲，請家長留意孩子最後一堂課的時間，如圖。

🌟今天帶回水彩用具、蠟筆和粉蠟筆，請留在家中，等八月暑期輔導再帶來學校。（帶回家的大袋子請記得再帶來學校，我們陸續打包物品回家！）

🌟下列簿本請留在家中複習，不用再帶來了：
國語課本、國語習作、國語補充教材、甲本、乙本、國語課堂練習、引導閱讀本、數學課本、數學習作、數學課堂練習、生活課本、生活課堂練習、生活習作、健康課本、聽寫簿、週記簿兩本、閱紀、國語筆記簿

author: Teacher Patty
content_raw:
2026 June 12th Friday
1️⃣ 評量通知單簽名。（請簽兩格，到20週）
2️⃣ 國複習兩張。（一張改錯字練習，一張成語練習）
3️⃣數複習一張兩面。（數學複習共兩張四面，先寫第二張，共兩面！）
4️⃣ 確實複習國、數、生期末考。
5️⃣ 整理書包。（帶回家的簿本就不要再帶來囉！下週一可以帶整理好的考卷和學習單來蓋章）
6️⃣ 帶一個大袋子。（我們期末考完，就會開始陸續打包，請讓孩子帶一個可以耐重，可以提的大袋子，也可以待育才提袋。）
7️⃣ 訂簽國卷一張和數卷一張。
8️⃣ 完成週記並簽名。（這學期週記共要寫六篇，沒有寫六篇的孩子，本週要寫一篇，題目自訂。）

🌟這週複習的甲、乙卷和國、數複習單已經在上課時間對過答案了，老師不會收回批閱！如果孩子沒有對到答案，如圖，請參考二綠資料夾！

🌟下列簿本請留在家中複習，不用再帶來了：
國語習作、國語補充教材、甲本、乙本、國語課堂練習、引導閱讀本、數學課本、數學習作、數學課堂練習、生活課本、生活課堂練習、生活習作、健康課本、聽寫簿

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
溫馨提醒：未來一週天氣不穩，請每日攜帶雨具

親愛的家長您好：

近日天氣不穩，未來一週可能持續降雨。為了讓孩子安全、順利到校，請家長協助提醒孩子每天攜帶雨傘或雨衣，避免上放學途中淋濕。

若您開車接送孩子入校，請在孩子下車前先將雨具準備好。孩子一下車即可自行撐傘或穿雨衣，不需站在車旁等待家長協助，這樣可以減少後方車輛等待，也讓校門口動線更順暢。

也請家長一同配合維持車道通行，避免臨停過久或造成後方堵車。小小一個提前準備，孩子安心，大人也輕鬆。

感謝您的配合與協助。  
讓我們一起守護孩子安全上學、平安到校。

私立育才雙語小學學務處 敬啟

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
親愛的家長您好：
學校轉發教育局反毒宣導資料，提醒您與孩子共同了解，多一點認識，多一層保護。
現在的毒品偽裝手法日新月異，可能藏在糖果、飲料、奶茶包、咖啡包、果凍，甚至電子煙、煙彈或奇怪粉包之中，外觀完全不像毒品，孩子往往認不出來。
請在家中提醒孩子牢記四個原則：不拿、不喝、不碰、不幫帶。特別要告訴孩子，即使是同學、網友或朋友的朋友給的東西，都不能隨便吃喝；有人強迫你試，那不是朋友，請直接拒絕、離開現場，並告訴爸媽或老師。
反毒教育不是要嚇孩子，而是讓孩子知道哪些東西不能碰、哪些情況要拒絕、遇到事情要找誰。我們無法24小時陪伴在孩子身旁，但可以事先把保護自己的能力教給他們。
附上相關宣導圖卡，歡迎家長收藏並與身邊的家長分享。如有疑問，歡迎與導師或學務處聯繫。
敬祝　闔家平安
                                                                                                       私立育才雙語小學 敬啟

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
各位家長您好：

為配合學生相關福利與牛奶領取作業，請協助確認孩子是否已持有「新北兒童卡」。

 若孩子尚未辦理新北兒童卡，家長可至新北市任一區公所辦理。

申辦時請備妥以下資料：  
1. 申請書  
2. 戶口名簿正本及影本  
3. 學籍證明文件，以下擇一即可：  
   - 由學校開立在學證明  
   - 當學期學雜費或營養午餐繳費單  
4. 身分證明文件

再請家長撥空協助確認，感謝您的配合。

私立育才雙語小學學務處

author: Dir. Chen
content_raw:
各位家長好，
5月19日下周二是本年度 1~5年級的英語歌曲比賽盛事，歡迎各位家長前來永和國父紀念館觀賞。
 在此附上早上(1、3、5年級)的表演流程表，和下午(2、4年級)的表演流程。
下列幾點麻煩家長務必配合:
1. 因為場地空間有限，請依照您孩子所屬年級表演的時間入座，把位子留給先表演的年級的家長們。 

2. 表演場地內嚴禁飲食，請家長切勿攜帶入內。

3. 場內設有攝影席，輪到表演的班級上台前會讓家長入座。攝錄影時請勿使用自拍棒，也請勿站立於攝影席內。 

4. 孩子演出後下台時，請讓孩子們迅速跟隨老師回班級位子就坐，請勿跟隨或是留住孩子拍照，以免影響後續班級的表演。

謝謝大家的配合! 
                                                                                      雙語部敬上 05.13. 2026

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
親愛的家長您好：

為讓孩子能善用「新北兒童卡」之相關優惠，茲將重要說明事項轉知如下，請家長詳閱：

一、優惠對象

1. 戶籍為新北市，年滿6歲未滿12歲之兒童。
2. 學籍為新北市各公私立小學之就讀兒童（不受12歲限制）。

二、搭乘優惠

- 臺北捷運、新北捷運（含輕軌）：4折
- 桃園捷運、高雄捷運：5折
- 公車及臺鐵：半價

※ 提醒：年滿12歲以上搭乘台鐵請購買全票，勿使用新北兒童卡，以免遭補收全票票款。

三、卡片申請

- 學籍在本市者，由交通局統一製作，小一入學後由學校發放，無需另外申請。
- 戶籍或學籍在外縣市者，請由法定代理人攜帶申請書、戶口名簿（正影本）及相關身分證明文件，至本市任一區公所辦理。
- 補製卡費用：首次申請或非人為因素免費；遺失或人為毀損補辦者需繳 100元。

四、遺失或毀損處理

1. 請先撥打悠遊卡客服專線*02-412-8880 辦理掛失。
2. 完成掛失及註銷後，再由法定代理人攜帶相關文件至任一區公所辦理補發。

五、注意事項

- 新北兒童卡僅限本人使用，借予他人或冒用者，依法除補繳票價外，並須支付票價50倍之違約金。
- 使用期限至持卡人小學畢業年度之10月31日止。
- 戶籍與學籍均已遷出新北市者，請停止使用並向悠遊卡公司辦理退卡。

如有任何疑問，歡迎聯繫：
- 交通局承辦人：(02) 2960-3456 分機 6981
- 悠遊卡客服：02-412-8880

敬祝 闔家平安

私立育才雙語小學 敬上

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

After feedback this morning about the online quiz platform not showing the answers, I have dug around in the settings and there is a way for the correct answer to be shown when an answer is wrong. However, this will immediately show the correct answer when a wrong answer is given.

I can turn this option on for future online quizzes, but it may hinder improvement as the answers will be handed to the children without them having to think about why they may have got a question wrong. 

Another option is to post an answer key into Class Dojo so that you can manually check and give feedback to questions with your children.

Please let me know which you prefer?

I have attached an answer key for yesterday's online quiz for reference.

Is the online quiz different this time? As far as I'm aware, it is running the same as the previous 4 times we've used this website.

Thank you for the feedback, I hope we can avoid these problems next time.

content_raw:
Dear parents,

Today a letter is being sent home. It explains our science project class. The class will be on Wednesday May 13th.

We are are asking each student to bring into school a small item from home that makes light and/or sound. We will discuss these items in the class as a group.

I encouraged the children to avoid anything valuable or fragile.

No ipads, tablets, cell phones, or games consoles please.

The more interesting or unusual the item the better.

Thank you for your support.

Tr. Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

Today I introduced this year's Storytelling Contest to the class. This is an individual competition similar to the one at the same time during grade 1.

If your child is interested in taking part, please help them to choose a story and start learning how to present it. I will provide guidance where possible, but this will largely be a performance prepared outside of class time. 

Stories written or created by the children themselves are accepted.

I will provide more details when I have the official instructions from school admin.

Have a wonderful long weekend, 

Tr. Adam

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
私立育才雙語小學 — 接送停車熄火宣導

親愛的家長您好：

感謝您每天接送孩子上下學！為維護校園周邊的空氣品質，保護孩子與鄰近社區居民的健康，懇請您在停車等候時**隨手熄火**。

依據《空氣污染防制法》，引擎連續怠速超過 **3 分鐘**即屬違規，可處罰鍰 **1,200 元至 6,000 元**，敬請留意。

此外，怠速等候不僅造成空氣污染，廢氣異味也對住在一樓的鄰居帶來困擾，請大家互相體諒、共同維護友善的社區環境。

**小提醒：等待超過 1 分鐘，熄火比怠速更省油！**

感謝您的配合與支持，讓我們一起為孩子創造更健康的成長環境！🌿

私立育才雙語小學 敬上

author: Mr. Liao
content_raw:
育才小學暑期營隊-《未來領袖成長營》是一個孩子在科學知識、運動、手做、烹飪營隊中，另外一個學習「認識自己」的營隊。
講師是國語日報暢銷書《名人的成長》作者。有多年採訪校園和親子新聞的經驗。本營隊以 SMI(美國成功激勵學院) 生命之鑰五大核心為架構，透過系統化課程設計，帶領學生從「認識自己」、「學習自律」到「實踐行動」，培養孩子自信與領導能力。

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

We have two singing/chanting performances on the horizon.

The first is our School Anniversary. The event will happen on May 9th. The children will be required to perform a short (30 second) chant in front of school leaders and parents. We have selected the following chant.

"1, 2, 3, 4
1, 2, 3, 4
And soooo, we are 2-Sage.
We’re taking the stage, as we’re walking on by.
So, happy birthday! 
We give our school a “thank you”, cuz’ Yu-Tsai’s great!"

This will be performed to the chorus melody of 'Don't Look Back in Anger' by Oasis.

Original Song: https://youtu.be/cmpRLQZkTb8?si=NY39tivZabRk0Pz6&t=64
KTV Version: https://youtu.be/GH5Brf0JPtA?si=OY249EnF-1ecei99&t=77

We will be practicing at school in the lead up to the event. Any extra practice at home would be appreciated. 

---------------------------------------------------------------

The second event is our singing contest. This will happen on May 19th.

We have several singing practice sessions scheduled between now and then. It is essential that the children practice their singing at home periodically as well. This will help them to perform at their best. It also allows the practice sessions to fine tune the performance, rather than simply learn the basics of the song.

The song is 'Imagine' by John Lennon.

Original Song: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k5ykDJchVBs
Piano Backing Track: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UbybB9Cayvk

I have attached a lyric and timing sheet. This will allow the children to follow the rhythm of the song. The goal is to sing, not chant the song. This is a soft, piano led song, and is to be sung calmly.

Again, any practice time you can manage at home would be a big help.

Happy singing,

Tr. Adam

author: Stephen Temple
content_raw:
Yu Tsai Bilingual Elementary School Cambridge KET & PET Summer Camps.
Yu-Tsai will offer two different two-week Cambridge courses this summer from 8 a.m. -4:30 p.m. each day.
Both courses we will be using the KET&PET Cambridge Test Trainer book, which is compiled of 2 training tests and 6 complete tests.
We will also have a couple of P.E. and/or Art & Craft classes each day to break up the learning and provide the kids with the rest needed to promote learning effectively during the day.

KET course dates July 6th-July17th
PET course dates July 20th-July 31st
The classes will be taught by Teacher Stephen

* Testing will be done throughout the day with feedback and support provided to each individual student.
* KET & PET writing will be completed during the last period of each day. It will be marked the following morning during the first period before classes start and feedback + corrections will be carried out.
* KET & PET speaking will be completed also during the last period of the day, whilst others are busy writing, I will carry out the speaking tests, which will be done with one teacher and 2-3 students in the same way as they would be tested.
* KET & PET reading and use of English sections will be completed throughout day, with story vocabulary support to help better understand the texts and the questions.
* KET & PET listening will be completed daily and any new vocabulary or phrases for each test question and the related audio script explained in detail to help the children understand how they could have gotten the answer correct.
* KET & PET vocabulary and grammar learning will be supported by the use of ready-made Cambridge PPT made for each topic area or grammar concept that is learnt/covered/needed for each Cambridge level.
* P.E and/or Art & Craft periods during the day to allow the kids time to rest between learning and have some fun with their summer camp classmates.
*Please be aware that the KET level comes before the PET level and the content builds up from one level to the next.

育才 劍橋 KET & PET 夏日衝刺班
育才將於今年夏天提供兩期 (每期兩週) 的劍橋英檢考前衝刺課程。這兩期課程都將使用（Cambridge Test Trainer books），內容包含 2 份訓練考題與 6 份完整模擬試題 。
為了調節學習步調並讓孩子們得到必要的休息 ，我們每天也會安排體育課或美勞手作課 ，以確保孩子們在白天的學習更有效率 。
• 本課程由擁有豐富教授劍橋英檢的英國籍外師 Teacher Stephen授課 。
• KET衝刺班日期： 7 月 6 日至 7 月 17 日
• PET 衝刺班日期： 7 月 20 日至 7 月 31 日
• 每天上課時間為上午 8 點至下午 4 點 30 分 。
課程內容：
• 評量與回饋： 模擬評量將貫穿全天進行 ，並針對每位學生的情況提供個別的回饋與支援 。
• 寫作部分： KET & PET 的寫作會在每天的最後一節課完成 。老師會在隔天早上8點開始的那節課進行批改 ，隨後進行回饋與修正建議 。
• 口說部分： KET & PET 的口說評量同樣在每天的最後一節進行 。當其他學生在練習寫作時，老師會進行口說評量，將由一位老師對 2 至 3 位學生進行 ，模擬實際考試的形式 。
• 閱讀與英語運用： 此部分將在全天穿插完成 。我們會學習閱讀內的單字，幫助學生更透徹地理解文本與閱讀理解的相關問題 。
• 聽力部分： 聽力練習將每天進行 。我們會詳細解釋每個聽力評量的問題及其音檔腳本中的新單字或片語 ，幫助孩子們理解如何辨別出正確答案 。
• 單字與文法： 單字與文法的學習將輔以專門製作的劍橋 PPT 。這些 PPT 針對每個劍橋等級所需的各個主題領域或文法概念進行設計 。
• 休閒時間： 會穿插體育課或美勞課，旨在讓孩子們在密集學習空檔中獲得休息 ，並與夏令營的同學們共度愉快時光 。
Translation viewed by 40 parents

author: Teacher Patty
content_raw:
----------
CLASS EVENT

114學年度世界閱讀日「好書交換活動」實施計畫
April 7, 2026 to April 24, 2026
----------

📖收書📒
（一）時間：115 年4月7日（二）至115年4月24日（五）午休時間。
（二）地點：本校教務處（三）收書原則：
1. 數量限制：須經家長同意，每人最多提供5本。
2. 出版年份：僅接受 2011 年（民國100 年（含））以後出版、有版權且封面及內頁須清潔完好之中文或英文圖書，如有破損、受潮或塗鴉者等情形者均不受理。
3. 不予受理：教科書、參考書、雜誌、受潮、塗鴉、違反著作權法之書籍或幼兒識字卡等。教科書、參考書、電腦用書、期刊、雜誌、宣傳性出版品、佛堂經書、幼兒識字卡（書）、違反出版法、著作權法之圖書資料、租書店圖書；磁碟片、錄音帶及錄影帶，及其他圖書館認定不宜者，均不在受理範圍；CD、VCD、DVD 如為書籍附件，請與原書籍一起交換。
4.兌換方式：請於收書時間內，將符合收書原則之圖書送到教務處，初步檢視統計後，即交付【好書交換券】。一本書可兌換【好書交換券】一張，二本書兩張以此類推。
5.同齡交換原則：為確保同學們能交換到適合目前閱讀程度的圖書，建議提供與自己目前年齡層相符的書籍，避免提供幼兒時期或過於低幼的書籍。
6.育才教師亦可參與換書活動，換書原則同上述說明。
7.教務處擁有圖書處理權，提供者不得有任何異議或要求退還。

📌好書交換活動自由參加。

🔗好書交換活動電子檔如連結🔗https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gnQeAHRjnu0q6wnFnxxNauJzCKdtXJZf/view?usp=drive_link

author: Dir. Chen
content_raw:
謝謝於上周六前來參加今年暑期加拿大遊學說明會的家長們。 
如果還有家長有興趣進一步了解行程內容的，可以參考附上的這份簡章。
還可以掃描簡章第一頁右上角的QRcode, 就可以看到當天的簡報內容。
重點整理如下:
【2026 加拿大暑期樂學團
### **1. 基本資訊**
**對象：** 10~12 歲 G3~G6 (含應屆畢業生）
                     (歡迎兄弟姊妹或親友一起參加) 。
 
**日期：** 2026/07/05（台北出發～ 2026/07/26（抵達台北），共計三週 
 
**地點： 加拿大卑詩省 Delta，Southpointe Academy(當地私立 IB 學校）。
**名額：** 6 人成團，15 人滿團 。

### **2. 課程與活動特色**
**專業營隊：** 涵蓋科學探索（Science Fair）、機器人編程（BotBuilders）及機器人對戰（RoboBattle）。
* 
**生活應用： 練習買東西、搭公車、準備午餐盒、整理床鋪等獨立生活能力 
* 
**課後體驗：** 由 Teacher David 帶領保齡球、烤肉 BBQ、溫哥華城市探索、UBC 大學參訪及沙灘抓螃蟹等活動 。

### **3. 費用說明**
**育才專案價：** **新台幣 186,000 元** 。
**費用包含：** 機場接送（學校與機場間）、交通費、課程與教材費、校外教學、Homestay 住宿及三餐、相關保險 。
**費用不含：** 台北－溫哥華來回機票、個人護照費、加拿大簽證費、個人消費 。
**住宿安排：** 團體 Homestay，學生與帶隊老師同住，6~8 人一室（男女分開） 。

### **4. 報名與聯絡方式**

**報名期限：** 即日起至 **3 月 15 日** 止 。
* 
**報名程序：** 1.  繳交訂金 10,000 元（註明學生班級與姓名）。
2.  加入「享樂學」官方 LINE， 告知銀行帳號末五碼 。(請看簡章內官方 Line QRcode)

**尾款繳交：** 3/27 (五) 前完成 。
**聯絡人：** Bobbie 老師 (0927-720-050)

【邀請函】2026 加拿大暑期遊學團說明會

各位家長好：

新的年度開始，是否想給孩子一個難忘的暑假呢？我們即將舉辦 2026加拿大暑期遊學團說明會，誠摯邀請三至六年級的同學與家長一同參加！

本次說明會將由陳育新主任主持，並由帶團老師Teacher Bobbie 和 Teacher David 親自詳細介紹為期三週的豐富行程與學習環境。

說明會時間：2026年3月8日（星期日）11:30 AM
地點：本校五樓活動中心
遊學日期：2026年7月5日 — 7月26日
招收對象：本校三至六年級學生 

精彩回顧：
在參加說明會前，歡迎先透過影片感受2024年遊學團的快樂時光：
[2024遊學影片連結]  https://youtu.be/RTPhFghPQKY

人數統計:
為方便統計人數，有意參加說明會的家長，請點擊下方表單填寫資料：
https://forms.gle/F2c7MKpnNGtMYcJd8

期待在說明會與您見面！

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
欢迎来到学校故事
与所有和您学校连接的家长和老师分享校园时刻。

Yu-Tsai Bilingual Elementary School会发生什么事？

照片/视频
活动

文件
女士 Jennifer
Yu-Tsai Bilingual Elementary School
1 小時前

育才Idol：尋找心中的閃亮榜樣
親愛的家長：
兒童節快到了！學校特別舉辦「育才Idol」活動，展現孩子們的才藝。今年的兒童節，我們不只要送禮物，更要送孩子一個「發光的舞台」！

什麼是 Idol？
Idol 不一定是明星，可以是身邊努力工作的爸爸媽媽、熱愛運動的同學，或是堅持夢想的歷史人物。我們學習他們的勇氣與努力！

如何參加？
育才Idol活動將採初選與複選方式進行。初選以影片甄選為主，經評選後，將於 3 月 20 日選出 10 人（組-2或3人）參加4月1日複選。
• 準備表演： 唱歌、跳舞、說故事或彈樂器都可以。
• 拍攝影片： 拍下 1-3 分鐘的表演片段。影片長度以不超過3分鐘為原則。
• 截止日期： 從今日起，於 3/16（一）前完成初選報名表單與影片上傳。

評量方式：
本活動不採競爭排名，以「鼓勵與欣賞」為主。
• 入選公告： 3月20日公告10 位（組）參賽者
• 現場票選： 4月1日兒童節活動當天由全校學生投票選出「我最想給予掌聲的人」。

精彩獎賞：
可獲得專屬獎盃與紀念禮物。
• 最佳舞台魅力獎
• 最佳創意表現獎
• 最佳自信風範獎
私立育才雙語小學 敬上
(學務處02-29214630#630-632)

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1v5DKHaNQ1F9rMu8TDmyeluCdqVekkAkmit_9RfRbEmI/viewform?edit_requested=true

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

We have earned a spare class in science this semester as we are on schedule, and today we used it to explore the water cycle and the size of the solar system in two separate activities.

First, we investigated ice cubes, before heating them and adding salt and food coloring. We discussed how salt dissolves into the water and can only be separated by boiling the water, turning it into a gas and leaving the salt behind. This showed the three states of water. The salt took on the color of the food coloring. 

After this, we demonstrated the size of the universe on a scale of 200 billion : 1.  We placed balls on cones and paced out the distances between the planets.

Hopefully everybody enjoyed exploring these concepts, without the pressure of memorising them for a test.

Also, we were able to experience pickleball on Friday afternoon. The children had the chance to try hitting the ball. Pickleball is currently being promoted to schools by the Ministry of Sports. I'm glad to have had the opportunity to introduce the children to this sport in a different sort of PE class than usual. Pictures here: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1yk_K1a9XSvv73a8TOgdY0WVJ8_zzMrXG?usp=sharing

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

As we are approaching the end of the semester, there is some admin to take care of.

From today, the Math WB books can remain at home as they are complete. Any outstanding corrections can be brought to me before the end of Friday.

The English WB and MyView books will remain in the students' lockers and will be used next semester. Outstanding corrections can be brought to me before Friday.

New Math WB and Pubils books will be issued this week and will remain in school until next semester.

Grade-wide winter homework will be issued tomorrow. It asks the children to write short entries that either tell me some things they did during the holidays, and/or explain Lunar New Year to me more generally.

As for the future. The schedule for next semester is tight, with less than 10 classes to complete most units, and a three-day review period before the midterm exam. This will mean new material comes at a similar pace to our two units since the final exams. Homework corrections will need to be even more consistant as scores will drop for some without maintained focus.  I will go into these details during our Parents Day in early March.

Thank you for your continued support and hard work with your children this semester. I am still so proud of the class for their amazing final exam scores. Well done everybody. Enjoy your holidays.

Tr. Adam

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
寒假期間校園門禁管制及接送說明通知單
親愛的家長您好：
    為維護學生及校園安全，寒假期間（01/26－02/06）本校實施門禁管制措施，相關規定說明如下，敬請家長與學生配合：
一、校園進出規定
1. 寒假期間家長及車輛請勿進入校園。
2. 校園僅開放指定時段與出入口。
二、到校時間（07:00－07:50）
1. 學生請一律由前門步行進入校園。
2. 需於07:30前到校之學生，請統一由前門進入。
   ※ 配合執勤人員作業，請勿早於07:00到校。
3. 永貞路23巷小側門不開放。
三、放學時間（16:30－17:00）
1. 家長請由前門接送學生離校。
2. 永貞路23巷（麻油雞路口）由值班老師帶隊看顧：
   - 16:30－16:45 於路口等候家長接回
   - 16:45 尚未接走之學生，將由老師帶回學校前門等候
3. 後門不開放。
四、課後安親班接送（18:00後）
18:00－18:30 課後安親班學生，請家長一律由前門接回。
敬請家長事先與孩子約定好接送時間及地點，共同維護學生安全。
感謝您的理解與配合！
私立育才雙語小學       敬啟
(學務處02-29214630#630-632 )

4️⃣ 帶一個大袋子。（這個星期五我們會開始讓孩子帶一些物品回家整理，開學後再帶來！請讓孩子帶一個可以打包的大袋子來學校裝東西。）
(週四英文作業，外師還沒有更換，屆時請直接參考孩子的聯絡簿)

Happy birthday 🎁🎂 Elena 🥳

自備字典。比賽時間為四十分鐘，共50題。每一題需要填寫部首、扣除部首的筆畫、注音和造詞(以該字的第一個語詞為準)和頁數，完整答對一題獲得2分 ，得分最高為查字典王👑。

author: 女士 Varley
content_raw:
https://signup.ytes.ntpc.edu.tw/ytActivity/form/list.html

🔥【老師強力推薦｜名額極少｜錯過真的要等】🔥

這一堂課，
我必須很老實、很直接地說——

👉 位置真的非常有限
👉 老師真的非常強
👉 對害羞孩子，真的很有愛、很懂

所以如果你看到這一段，
請不要滑走。

⸻

🌟 為什麼這堂《表演性閱讀 Performative Reading》一定會滿？

因為 Teacher Adam 教的，
不是「表演給人看」，
而是——

✔ 讓不敢說話的孩子，慢慢敢開口
✔ 讓害羞的孩子，在安全的小組裡被看見
✔ 讓孩子把「我不敢」變成「我可以試試看」

這不是逼孩子上台，
而是一步一步，把孩子 整個人帶出來。

很多孩子在這堂課裡，
第一次發現：
✨「原來，我也可以站在大家面前。」

⸻

🤍 如果你的孩子有這些情況，這堂課就是為他設計的
	•	英文不差，但一開口就卡住
	•	在班上很安靜，常常被忽略
	•	害羞、內向，但其實很有想法
	•	家長一直希望他「再有自信一點」

👉 這堂課不是選修，是關鍵。

⸻

🔒 為什麼位置這麼少？

因為 Teacher Adam 只做小班制。
他堅持：
	•	每個孩子都要被聽見
	•	每個孩子都要被引導
	•	每個孩子都值得被溫柔對待

這種課，
👉 不可能開很多人
👉 不可能無限加名額

滿了，就真的沒有了。

⸻

⏰ 誠實提醒

如果你心裡有一個聲音在說：
「這堂課，好像很適合我的孩子。」

請你現在就幫孩子把位置留下來。

因為等你再想一下，
通常就只剩候補。

⸻

🌱 有些能力不會寫在考卷上

🌱 卻會影響孩子一輩子

📍 每週 4:30–6:00
📍 Teacher Adam 親自設計・親自帶課
📍 小班制｜名額極少｜先到先得

🔥 這一堂，真的會秒殺。
🔥 錯過，只能等下一次。

— 老師真心、強力推薦 💛

author: 女士 Varley
content_raw:
https://signup.ytes.ntpc.edu.tw/ytActivity/form/list.html

✨別忘記喔！名額有限，趕快來報名 Ms. T 禮拜五的才藝班✨

孩子們不只是在上課，而是在開心中學習、在探索中成長。
每一堂課都充滿創意、互動與成就感，讓孩子帶著笑容回家、帶著自信進步 

📘📗 為什麼在同一堂課中同時學習

《Essential Vocabulary in Context》 與 《Handbook for Reading》with Ms T？

在這門課程中，孩子不只是學單字，而是學會如何運用單字來閱讀、理解內容，並自信地表達想法。
透過將 《Essential Vocabulary in Context》 與 《Handbook for Reading》 有系統地結合，我們打造了一套完整且平衡的閱讀學習課程，全面支持孩子的英語閱讀發展。

⸻

🌱 讓單字在閱讀中真正「活起來」

《Essential Vocabulary in Context》 透過主題式學習與生活化情境，介紹重要的高頻字彙與學術字彙。孩子不再只是死背單字，而是理解單字在句子、故事與實際對話中的用法。

搭配 《Handbook for Reading》，孩子能立刻將新學到的單字應用在自然發音、拼讀練習與引導閱讀中，讓字彙真正內化，成為孩子日常語言的一部分。

⸻

📖 從「發音」到「單字」再到「理解」

《Handbook for Reading》 為孩子打下扎實的閱讀基礎，包括：
	•	自然發音與字母拼讀
	•	單字解碼能力
	•	閱讀流暢度
	•	初階閱讀理解策略

同時，《Essential Vocabulary in Context》 則強化：
	•	單字意思與實際運用
	•	語言自信心
	•	聽說能力
	•	閱讀理解深度

兩本教材相輔相成，一步一步引導孩子從「會念」到「看得懂」，真正建立閱讀能力。

⸻

⭐ 培養更強的閱讀者，也培養更會思考的孩子

同時學習這兩本書，能幫助孩子：
	•	更有自信且準確地閱讀
	•	更深入理解文章內容
	•	使用更豐富的字彙表達想法
	•	為未來的學術閱讀打下穩固基礎

這樣的教學方式同時照顧閱讀能力較強與仍在發展中的孩子，讓每一位學生都能感受到成功與被支持。

⸻

💛 以孩子為核心的溫暖教學設計

這門課程的設計理念是：
	•	有結構，但不死板
	•	重視技巧，也充滿樂趣
	•	有挑戰性，同時給予鼓勵

透過字彙與閱讀的結合，孩子會發現：
閱讀是有意義的、做得到的，而且是快樂的。

⸻

✨ 一堂課，孩子將收穫：

✔ 扎實的自然發音與閱讀基礎
✔ 能實際運用的核心字彙
✔ 明顯提升的閱讀理解能力
✔ 作為英語讀者的自信心

這不只是一堂閱讀課，
而是一個讓單字轉化為理解、讓閱讀建立自信的學習旅程。

Ms. T

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

A. Today's online quizzes homework refers to the previous quizzes for each unit. They remain open at the same link as before:

https://app.quizalize.com/student/code/dmv83796

The units that will be tested tomorrow are:

5.5: Signs of Winter
2.1.1: Ocean Treasures
2.1.2: Boxes of Blooms
2.1.3: from Places We Go

B. 21 students made mistakes in last nights homework when copying from the box to answer the HFW and Vocabulary sentences. They were correct with their word choice, but made mistakes in the spelling. I have to deduct points for this tomorrow and it would be a shame if anybody were to make such a mistake after working so hard for the exam. This is not the first time I have highlighted this problem to the class.

I have added a note to the communication books of the 21.

C. Make sure your child gets a good nights sleep and arrives ready to do their best tomorrow. I hope we can earn some great scores together.

Thank you to all for your hard work and support with the children.

Tr. Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

The writing homework today is designed to provide practice for the final exam.

It is not a writing competition. I have been stressing to the children about writing as simply as possible:

Not to use words they don't know how to spell
Not to use complex or compound sentences
Only writing 5-7 sentences
Remembering to write a title with Capital Letters In It

The rubric at the bottom of the homework paper is the same one that will be used in the exam. It doesn't give points for writing amazing, funny, interesting stories. It gives points for not making mistakes.

I love to read the creative work of the students in our writing units. This is a test, not a writing unit. They should focus on keeping it simple.

I hope you enjoyed the holiday yesterday.

Tr. Adam

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
新北兒童卡確認通知單（含鮮奶政策宣導）

親愛的家長您好：

因配合新北市政府推動的 「鮮奶幸福週」 政策，請家長確認學生是否持有 「新北兒童卡」已享受政府的美意。
此卡將作為政府補助憑證之一，影響孩子是否能順利領取相關鮮奶補助，敬請家長確認以下事項：

一、請家長確認孩子是否持有「新北兒童卡」
請您今日回家後，協助孩子確認卡片是否仍在。
如卡片已遺失或找不到，則需重新補辦（補辦方式如下）。

二、若未持有或已遺失，請至戶政事務所補辦
家長請攜帶“戶口名簿或身分證明文件” 至任一區公所辦理補發。
※ 補辦時間短、資料簡單，請家長儘速補齊以免影響後續補助。

三、政府「鮮奶幸福週」政策宣導
為鼓勵兒童攝取足夠乳品營養，政府推動 **鮮奶幸福週**，將提供孩童鮮奶補助。

因此，請家長務必確認卡片，以確保孩子能完整享有補助。

若您有任何疑問，請與學務處聯繫，我們會協助後續處理。
感謝家長的配合，讓政策能順利推動，孩子也能安心受惠。

私立育才雙語小學   學務處 敬上

本校原訂於 12 月 24 日（星期三）上午 8:00 舉辦的《114 學年度歲末聯歡暨才藝成果發表會》，因應活動流程調整，節目順序與部分表演時間將做出異動，請您留意更新資訊，協助孩子準備。

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

We have completed our review for U2.1.3: from Places We Go. The unit test will be on Thursday morning. The online quiz will be posted later today and will be set as homework tomorrow evening.

We will then begin our review period leading up to the final exam. It is vital that the children retain their focus and hard work throughout review week, where independent study in class will be used more. We will still have review classes led by me, but some classes will be more individual focused. This is because each child's review needs and problem areas will be different.

Whilst generally the class work well in these sessions. There are some who don't use this time properly. This was the case in the first period this morning. I removed all Dojo points from the class to be held by me. They will be returned when I see each person trying their best and showing self motivation. Some have already had their points returned. Others will follow for the rest of the day and beyond.

As the children get ready to enter grade 3, being self-motivated will become a vital skill. Academically, this class are excellent, scoring over 90% average in multiple recent unit tests. However, some still lack the maturity to study to their best without constant monitoring. I hope at address this issue before the end of grade 2.

🌟🌟🌟轉知學校寒假課後照顧班訊息🌟🌟🌟
親愛的家長您好：
本校寒假課後照顧班(G1-G6)原定之線上報名已於 11 月 14 日截止，但在近一個月內仍陸續收到個別家長補件報名。為確保後續的師資安排、教材採購、教學規劃與場地配置皆能完善進行，以提供孩子更優質與穩定的學習環境，學校將統一於 12 月 8 日（星期一）截止受理所有個別補報名。

有需要尚未完成報名的家長，請把握這幾天的時間，於期限前與導師告知完成報名作業，逾期將無法再受理，以利學校順利進行開課前的完整統計與準備。

感謝家長們的配合與支持，讓我們能共同為孩子提供更良好的寒假學習規畫。

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents, 

This year for Christmas we will have a 2nd grade Secret Santa on Wednesday the 24th of December.  All classes will meet on the 5th floor for some Christmas party activities.  Each child will receive a gift from another grade 2 child at random.  We need each child to buy a present of around the value of $300-$500.  Then, please get your child to bring it into school before the 24th and give it to the homeroom teacher.  
On Christmas Eve, we will exchange these gifts as a grade.  Please can you make sure if your child is a girl then to buy a gift for another girl, or if your child is a boy, please buy a gift for a boy, or even better try to buy neutral gifts for both boys and girls.  Please write boy or girl on the wrapped gift you bring.

Thank you,
Second grade teachers.

author: 女士 Varley
content_raw:
Hi Parents,

We are excited to announce that Teacher Stephen will be offering a special two-week Cambridge KET Intensive Course at the start of the winter vacation! Enrollment is now officially open, and spots are limited.

This compact program is designed to help students quickly and confidently build all the English skills needed for the KET level—reading, writing, listening, speaking, vocabulary, and more. With Stephen’s engaging teaching style and clear step-by-step guidance, students will feel more prepared than ever.

After completing this course, students who are ready can smoothly transition into the PET class, continuing their Cambridge learning journey with strong momentum.

This winter program is open to Grades 2–6, and it’s not just about studying—
we’ve planned fun games, interactive challenges, and team activities to keep the learning environment lively, motivating, and enjoyable every single day. Kids will learn, laugh, and grow all at the same time!

親愛的家長您好：

我們非常高興地宣布，Stephen 老師將在寒假開始時，推出為期兩週的劍橋 KET 精實課程！目前已正式開放報名，名額有限，歡迎及早預約。

這是一堂專為孩子打造的高效寒假課程，能讓學生在短時間內全面提升 KET 等級所需的英文能力——閱讀、寫作、聽力、口說、單字、文法，全部一次打包學好！
Stephen 老師擁有非常紮實的英語教學背景，教學清楚具體、專業又有耐心，孩子們在他的帶領下總是能快速進步、充滿自信。

完成這兩週的課程後，如果孩子有興趣，也可以無縫銜接 PET 課程，繼續在劍橋英文的道路上穩健向上。

這次的寒假班開放給 二至六年級的學生參加，除了學習之外，我們也特別安排了許多有趣的遊戲、互動活動和團隊挑戰，讓孩子每天都在「玩中學、學中玩」，課室氣氛活潑又充滿成就感！
孩子們不但會學到扎實的英文能力，還會在課程中笑聲不斷、每天都期待來上課！

如果您希望孩子在寒假過得充實、有趣又能大幅提升英文能力，這絕對是最棒的選擇。只要是有參加的小朋友都可以到Ms.T育才咖啡廳吃點心喔。

感謝您的支持

Dear Parents,

I have decided to issue extra reading homework for this weekend to address the weakness many have with this skill. 

To clarify, the Jack and the Beanstalk worksheet is the listed homework. This needs to be completed as normal.

The pumpkins and flowers worksheets are optional and don't have to be completed by Monday. However, I recommend completing them if possible. I will discuss all of the worksheets in class on Monday. 

It is ok to leave unknown answers blank, and I will explain how to complete those questions on Monday.

Have a great weekend.
Tr. Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Congratulations to the students scoring 100% in our Math and English Midterm exams.

Well done to everybody for their hard work over the last few weeks.

Our class scores were good, with a general weakness in reading comprehension. Keep working with Raz Kids to boost these skills at home.

There will be more reading comprehension focus in the next series of My View books, and I will be adding reading activities to our homework rotation to help address this area.

The exams will be returned home tomorrow as we decided to wait until the whole of grade 2 were complete and marked before sending them home. Please sign and return the exams to school by Monday.

Remember, we have our Science unit test tomorrow. The fact sheet, review test, and video links (see my previous post) will help with any extra review needed this evening.

Tr. Adam

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
新北市育才雙語小學 × 舊鞋救命活動宣導活動 🌍
👟【讓愛走完最後一哩路】~ 
在世界的某個角落，有孩子每天赤腳走在乾裂的土地上，
因為沒有鞋子，他們被迫停下求學的腳步。
我們邀請您和孩子一起參與
「舊鞋救命 Step30」——一場**從校園出發的愛心行動** 💛
我們相信：
教育不只是課本裡的知識，更是一次次「伸出援手」的實踐。
👣 一起響應愛的行動
一雙鞋，能讓孩子重新上學；
一份心，能讓愛真正走得更遠。
讓我們用行動教孩子什麼是關懷、什麼是責任、
一起把愛穿在腳上，走進世界的每一個角落🌍

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Our Science Unit Test will take place on Thursday morning. We have been reviewing in class today, and will continue tomorrow.

I have prepared a fact sheet to help the children prepare for the test. The difficult part of the test is the scientific vocabulary that needs to be known. Hopefully this fact sheet will help provide a focused guide showing what the children need to know. I have also found a range of short videos that cover all topics needed for the test. Please find it listed below.

I know that there a Chinese Exams this week and that time is scarce, but I hope these resources can be of use between now and Thursday.

Tr. Adam

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Living and Nonliving Things:

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

The Midterm Exam will take place on Thursday morning. We will have English first, followed by Math. Please try to arrive on time on Thursday.

Our review sessions have been going well, and I'm very pleased with the amount of hard work and effort the students have shown with all their review work in class and at home.

The online quizzes for each unit are linked below. They will be set as homework tomorrow as a final review before the test on Thursday.

5.1: Every Season
https://wayground.com/join?gc=23409962

5.2: Seasons Around the World
https://app.quizalize.com/student/code/dmv83796

5.3: In Spring
https://app.quizalize.com/student/code/dmv83796

5.4: My Autumn Book
https://app.quizalize.com/student/code/dmv83796

Good luck to everybody.

Tr. Adam

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
這週天氣變化大，台灣的冬天更是常常飄著雨。
若每位家長都下車撐傘接送孩子，校門口勢必壅車回堵，反而讓更多家長在車陣中等候。

其實，教育就是讓孩子學會面對生活中的挑戰。
相信我們的孩子，有能力撐起自己的傘，也能在導護老師的協助下安全下車，進入校園。
讓孩子多一點練習與信任，他們會比我們想像的更勇敢、更獨立。☔💪

以下建議和提醒希望大家配合，讓大家可以更有效率且安全的上學。

育才國小雨天接送提醒
做好這些準備讓孩子自行下車
從從容容 游刃有餘

✅ 預先穿雨衣或斗篷
✅ 使用雨傘（在家多練習）
✅ 平時就準備防雨的服裝（例如防潑水外套）

content_raw:
Dear parents,

The online quiz link is below:
https://app.quizalize.com/student/code/dmv83796

Class Code: dmv83796

A few reminders:

Halloween is coming in two weeks. Please prepare a costume for your child to wear on the day. Also, I will be continuing to collect Halloween candy/gifts/treats to use as prizes on the day. Thank you to those who have brought them in so far.

I have received some excellent submissions for the Yu-Tsai Magazine. There is still more than a month until the deadline, and I am happy to help anyone with ideas, planning, and proofreading.

The Midterm Exam is coming two weeks tomorrow. We will be starting our review lessons next week. Students may wish to prepare their homework folder for the worksheets that will begin flowing soon.

Unit Test 5.4: My Autumn Book is tomorrow morning. Please spend some time reviewing the Online Quiz this evening.

Thank you for your continued support with your child’s education.
Adam

content_raw:

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Today I presented the topic for our School Magazine writing to the children. We will be writing about either ‘My Favorite Instrument’ or ‘My Music Mixtape’.

At grade 2, the writing should be 10-15 sentences long, but of course, longer that that is great.

We have until December to finish the writing, so I encourage the children to think about planning their writing soon. I am available for help, advice, planning, checking, or ideas. Please use me as much as you need to.

I have attached the PowerPoint I used with the class, as well as a PDF of an example planning sheet the children could use. They have a copy of this planning sheet with them. The PowerPoint contains links to the songs I am writing about in my examples. 

I hope that we enjoy the writing, and I look forward to reading the submissions.

Tr. Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
2025 Halloween Party

Dear Second Grade Parents, 
	
The teachers of second grade will be hosting this year’s Halloween party on the 5th floor in the morning, and trick or treating will be in the afternoon on Friday the 31st of October.   

Please make sure your child comes to school dressed in their Halloween costume.  We will have a best costume competition for each class, as well as a variety of Halloween games. 

Your child is encouraged to dress up in a costume, but please NO TOY WEAPONS as this can lead to issues between children. 

We would like to ask for parents to bring in Halloween treats and give them to your homeroom teacher before the event on Thursday.  These candies will be used as prizes for dressing up, classroom games, and as treats for the trick or treating around the school.  Other small novelty items for boys and girls would be welcome such as stickers or pencils.  If you would like to bring in some treats for the children, then please give them to your child's homeroom teacher before the 31st.  

Thank you and Happy Halloween!

Yours Spookily,
Second Grade Teachers!

各位家長好:
有家長詢問英文數學電子書網站除了課本和習作的電子書版本外，是否還有其他資源?

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
新北市私立育才雙語小學交通安全提醒與通知
主旨：共同守護孩子上下學安全，敬請家長配合交通動線、不隨意停車
親愛的家長您好：
感謝家長對學校交通秩序與安全維護的支持。近期學校與家長會持續收到反映：「永貞路23巷口麻油雞店旁側於早晨時段車流量大，部分車輛與機車未依規定停靠家長接送區或久停或汽車直接迴轉，導致交通壅塞與安全疑慮，影響學童及社區用路人安全。」
孩子的安全與健康，是我們絕不容忽視的原則。為了營造更安全、順暢的上下學環境，學校與家長會將採取以下措施，敬請所有家長務必配合：
一、請家長配合事項
1. 請勿隨意停車於麻油雞店巷口兩側，請停於指定之家長接送區停車格。
2. 請勿在永貞路23巷口麻油雞店前黃色網狀線迴轉。
3. 建議家長送達後即刻離開，避免久停造成交通堵塞。
4. 請遵守交通指揮與導護老師的指示，依序通行。
二、後續規劃（分階段執行）
1.第一階段（觀察期一個月）：學校將持續加強導護宣導，並觀察家長配合情況。
2.第二階段（必要時）：若仍有屢勸不聽之情形，學校將與警局合作，加強巡查並依交通法規檢舉違規停車，確保學童安全。
三、孩子的安全不能等！
誠摯邀請每一位家長與我們一起用行動守護孩子，讓校園周邊成為最安心的上下學環境。 感謝您的理解與支持
新北市私立育才雙語小學敬上
民國114.9.16
學務處29214630#630

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
📣 健康防疫宣導通知 📣

各位家長大家好：

為了維護全校師生的健康安全，請大家配合以下防疫措施：

1️⃣ 關於發燒處理：
若學生出現發燒情形（耳溫達38°C、額溫達37.5°C），需由家長帶回就醫。
若家長一時無法前來接送，學校會安排學生進行隔離休息，以降低傳染風險。

2️⃣ 關於傳染性疾病（腸病毒、流感、水痘）之請假規定：
感染上述疾病者，請假期間為7天。若身體恢復良好、經醫師評估可以提早返校，請家長主動與導師聯繫，經主任同意後，方可返校上課。

📌 請大家共同維護健康的學習環境，保護自己，也保護他人！

感謝大家的配合！
私立育才雙語小學學務處敬上

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Today's homework is different from regular homework. Our first writing project will be writing a biography. To that end, the children are required to research a subject for their writing.

In class today, we completed a timeline of the author Roald Dahl. The homework is to complete a similar timeline about another subject of your child's choice. They are permitted to use informational text resources such as books or the internet to complete their timeline.

This will be used on Monday and Tuesday next week as we complete our writing project in class.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Secondly, thanks those who have returned their child's birth measurements to school for our science project. We will be using the data in class from September 24th onwards. Please ensure you send a copy of your child's birth measurements and a baby photo by next Friday (Sept. 19th).

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Finally,  the deadline to submit a book order through the Penguin books flyer you received at Parents’ Day is September 17th. Those who wish to purchase books, please send the money and order form back by this date.

Thank you and enjoy your weekend.

Tr. Adam

author: 女士 Jennifer
content_raw:
📢 接送重要提醒

親愛的家長您好：

低年級（1-2年級）：可開車進校園接送，方便照顧年幼孩子。

中高年級（3年級以上）：請與孩子約定在三個指定路口接送（福和路125巷口、永貞路23巷口、國中路齊家屋巷口），不進入校園。

校園是孩子的學習場域：保持純淨、安全，不因車輛與人潮干擾，讓孩子專注於學習與生活。

🙏 請大家一起遵守規範，把安全與空間留給需要更多照顧的低年級孩子，也幫助中高年級孩子學習獨立與自律。

感謝您的支持與配合 ❤️
私立育才雙語小學學務處敬上

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
It's great to see everybody back and raring to go for the new semester.

Congratulations and thank you to everyone who submitted an interview during August. It was great watching through everybody's questions, some tame and some more difficult for the poor interviewees to answer.

Your child will come home with a Unit Newsletter for our first unit - 5.1: Every Season. They will also have the progress quiz from the August session - Eleanor Roosevelt. This looks like an official unit test, but it will not be scored towards the final grade. It is only a progress quiz for me to gauge the level of understanding the children gained from that unit.

I wish everybody a successful and happy semester. "Go, Go, Grade2!"

The children did a wonderful job completing the activities in class today.

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

In class today we spent time interviewing each other, based on the PBI pages at the end of the My View Book. As a followup to that activity, I have told the children that if they wish to complete an interview with somebody from their family at home they may do.

Officially, there is no homework set during August, so this activity is completely optional.

The videos below come from the attached picture give examples of how real-world interviews can look.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rh3GJu8dB2s
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3PQ6TPL31J8

I have offered 100 Dojo points to anybody who can complete this activity before the end of August.

Videos can be submitted through Class Dojo via the portfolios section.

Keep practicing English at home.

Tr. Adam.

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

Here is just some of the excellent, high-effort writing that was produced today in class. I'm pleased with the general hard work of the class as we look to remember our skills, and start to build on our abilities from grade 1.

I look forward to marking the writing, and we will produce final drafts tomorrow. There will be another writing prompt next week.

I'm pleased we have some extra time in August to practice these core skills before the regular classwork resumes in September.

Keep up the great work, 2-Sage!

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

I hope you all had a wonderful summer. I look forward to seeing the children back in class next week.

There will be more communication to come, but for this morning, Tr. Tina has asked me to remind you of the art supplies we will need this year. The list is unchanged from grade 1, but some items may need replacing for the new school year.

Markers 彩色筆
Colored pencils 彩色鉛筆
Crayons 蠟筆
Oil pastels 粉蠟筆
Acrylic paint (assorted colors) 壓克力顏料(多色)
Watercolor paints 水彩
Paintbrushes (large, medium and small) 水彩筆
Paint palette 調色盤
Water cup for paint brushes 筆洗桶
Smock/ apron/ an old buttoned shirt 罩衫
Scissors 剪刀
Water glue 透明膠水
Black pen 黑色簽字筆
Permanent black marker 黑色奇異筆

See you all soon,

Tr. Adam.

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

This is the summer homework. Each child will also be given a paper copy to take home today. The purpose of this summer homework is to try to encourage the children to visit their local libraries and use the free English book resources that they have.

Please also try to encourage your children to move up the levels of 'Raz-Kids', as they will have access to it until the end of grade 2. It is an award-winning program that helps build up English language skills and the summer break is a great time to utilize it if you find yourself with some free time.

The children will also bring home their Math Pupils Books today. We have completed all the units in the book. There will be a progress check quiz on Thursday morning. Today is the final day for written homework. I will mark and stamp the books tomorrow to mark the end of the division unit. Math homework books will then stay at home from tomorrow evening.

The MyView and English WB books will stay with me until August when they will be used in class once again. 

Many thanks,
Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

The children completed a Unit 4.4 Progress Quiz in class today to mark the end of our final unit. This is not a unit test, although it looks like one. The scores are for me to see their progress through this unit. The scores will not be used as part of any official assessment or report card.

There will be a similar quiz for Math (Multiplication and Division) on Thursday.

Adam

author: Dir. Chen
content_raw:
各位家長好:
此為上周已由各班發下的劍橋英檢考試準備用書購買通知單。
為了方便學生準備檢測，本校與華泰文化合作預先提供較優惠的團購價格，讓您為孩子選擇合適的輔助練習用書，利用暑假先做準備。
請掃描通知單內的QRCode 上網訂購，由華泰文化直接處理，寄送到您指定的地址。
優惠期間至9/30(二) 截止。
建議家長盡早訂購，讓孩子利用暑假開始練習模擬試題，若有不理解的地方，開學時就可以去請教老師。
本校本年度與財團法人語言訓練測驗中心合作之劍橋英語檢測，將於新學期開學後委由各班導師調查報名意願及填寫報名資料。若您希望孩子參加在學校舉辦的檢測，請一律透過學校統一報名。

 結業式當天正常上課，早上會頒發五育成績優良獎、進步獎，同時發下中、英成績單。四點半之後一樣有課輔班。如果要提早離開，請一定要先跟老師說，以便老師安排。

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

The final exams are complete, and I finished the marking yesterday.

We have talked through the Math Exam in class today, and will correct the English tomorrow.

The exams can go home when the rest of the grade is ready. There are some students who need to retake tests in other classes.

Overall, the English average scores were similar to previous exams. This is good considering the material in unit 4 is much more difficult. There was a small dip in the math scores. Several sloppy mistakes mixed with a challenging test format caused this.

Between now and the end of the semester we have a final English story and two more Math units to complete. English and Math WB homework will continue, but today will be the last time we use the English Notebook this semester. Anybody who wants to continue with Spelling, HFW, and Vocabulary sentences is welcome to do them, and I will mark anything that is handed in. We have made a start with unit 4.4 and multiplication in our classes today.

Congratulations to all of the children for completing the final exams. It has been a lot of hard work, but hopefully rewarding. I have enjoyed seeing the growth and improvement in everybody. Well done to all of you for your efforts, and thank you for your support this semester.

Teacher Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

Our Final Exams will happen tomorrow morning.

English: 8:30-9:20
Math: 9:30-10:20

Please arrive at school in plenty of time to get settled and prepared before the exams begin.

Ensure your child gets plenty of sleep tonight so they can be fresh and ready to go tomorrow.

I have attached a slide from our writing review lesson to this post. It shows how a piece of opinion writing should be formatted, with a short opening paragraph listing reasons, a main paragraph explaining the three reasons with examples, and a closing paragraph restating the three reasons.

Also, remember that the online quizzes remain active:

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

To avoid confusion, I will explain today's homework.

There were three sheets given as homework, and one that should have been completed in class.

The class worksheet says: "Unit 3 Week 5 Day 1" in the top right corner. Students can ask me questions if they have any regarding the content of this worksheet.

The homework due tommorow is two single page worksheets (no staples). The first is a standard English worksheet with "Assessment" in the top right corner. The other asks the children to draw a timeline of their lives. They may predict the future towards the end of their timeline if they wish.

The final worksheet is a large bundle with many pages called 'G1S2 English Final Exam Review Packet 2025'. It covers all aspects of the final exam. This is not due until Tuesday and can be completed during future classes if they have finished the set work for the class early. It can be taken home, but should be returned to school each day to be worked on when time allows.

The Final Exam is next Wednesday. We are progressing through the review material very well in class. Thank you for your efforts at home with extra reviewing.

We're almost there... :)

Adam

content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Today the school has released the Mid-Term Exams from January. These can now be kept at home. To remember our achievements in that exam, and perhaps to inspire similar good results with out Final Exams next month, we have celebrated our 100% students from the Mid-Term Exams.

Your child will also come home with the Exam Coverage sheet which contains all the words and topics required for the Final Exam on June 11th. We will begin our review sessions next week.

Adam

author: Teacher Patty
content_raw:
----------
CLASS EVENT

育才68週年校慶活動暨母親節慶祝活動
May 10, 2025
----------

🎆育才68校慶活動說明 🎆
1️⃣ 校慶當天學生請在7:50前到校，校慶活動八點就會開始！
2️⃣ 校慶當天請穿著班服（英語歌曲比賽的綠色Ｔ）、白色綠邊短襪和白色運動鞋（請找時間將白鞋洗乾淨）。
3️⃣ 校慶當天可以背自己的包包，記得帶水壺和園遊券即可。
4️⃣ 校慶當天早上有校車，回程一律由家長接回，沒有回程校車。
5️⃣ 我們會依照校慶當天的天氣，滾動式調整校慶進行的方式（晴天版、室外版-場地濕滑或雨天版。）
6️⃣一年級活動表演結束後，園遊會就正式開始。約上午10點（雨天是9點20分），家長要先回一綠教室找老師簽退，之後就可以和孩子一起逛攤位，逛完園遊會，您就可以帶孩子回家囉！（為了孩子的安全，家長一定要親自來簽到並接孩子，無法委託同學的家長喔！）
7️⃣ 校慶當天，學校預計11:55(雨天11:15)放學，如果您在這個時間之前要帶孩子回家，請記得填好提早離校單(離校時間和家長簽名)，將此單子交給校門口的警衛或負責老師，就可以自行放學囉!

🔺為了避免遺失或忘了攜帶，提早離校單校慶當天發下，預購的園遊券週四會發給孩子。

😊感謝家長協助🙏🏻

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Today I introduced the children to our Story Telling Contest. It will take place on June 5th.

If your child in interested in participating they will need to:

Choose a story
Memorize it
Practice it
Make Props
Ask questions and check their progress with me to ensure they will be ready for the contest.

Unfortunately only 2 or 3 students can be chosen to compete, but if more are willing to try for the contest, I will host an in-class version for all of those children who don't make it into the official contest.

The chosen story needs to be 2-5 minutes long.

Here are some examples from previous classes:
https://www.ytes.ntpc.edu.tw/life_pic/112video/g1.storytelling.en.htm

Please ask if you have any questions about the contest.

Good luck to all who decide to take part.
Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

As we approach the School Anniversary celebration on Saturday May 10th, the class has been working hard to prepare for the festivities.

One part of the day will be our short class chant. I have attached a lyric sheet and link to a backing track to help with the timing.

https://youtu.be/K6DaBMJFlO0

We won't be using the backing track on the day. We will be clapping along at around 130bpm. This is a fast pace but the children have shown a great ability to keep up.

You can use a metronome such as 

https://guitarapp.com/metronome.html?tempo=130&timeSignature=2&pattern=1

to practice this speed of clapping and chanting at the same time.

We will be practicing several times in class over the next two weeks in the lead up to the day.

I look forward to seeing you all at the celebration.

Thank you for your continued support.
Adam

content_raw:
----------
CLASS EVENT

💚🌈0425星期五新竹北埔麥客田園校外教學🌈💚
April 25, 2025
----------

★校外教學注意事項
1.時間：時間：4/25(週五)     地點：北埔麥克農場
2.攜帶物品：
  □ 餐具(碗、湯匙)  □水壺  □手帕、衛生紙、濕紙巾 □防蚊、防晒用品 □ 小垃圾袋  □帽子  □ 備用服一套 （有需要自行準備）    □🌟輕便雨衣🌟  □ 少許零食
3.服裝：穿著育才運動服（建議可以穿短袖上衣和長褲）、運動鞋（建議穿自己的運動鞋）。
4.上、放學時間：7:45~16:30/18：00，請準時到校，逾時不候。當天為正常上課，才藝班、課輔照常進行唷！
5.會暈車的小朋友，早餐請勿食用奶製品，情況較嚴重的小朋友，最好事先服用暈車藥。
6.請家長協助叮囑孩子校外活動安全的重要！ 
7.若當天臨時有狀況無法出席，請盡速致電告知老師唷！感謝。
8.午餐麥克農場提供，記得攜帶餐具（餐碗和湯匙）。

content_raw:
----------
CLASS EVENT

七八月暑期營隊課程報名
April 21, 2025 to April 25, 2025
----------

⏰今天發下「暑假營隊課程表」一份，七月營隊非常多元，請家長們與孩子們共同討論安排暑假活動。

暑期營隊報名網址如下，4/21(一)晚上八點開始報名
https://signup.ytes.ntpc.edu.tw/ytActivity/form/list.html

🌟2025七、八月暑假營隊課程報名時間 4/21(一)～4/25(五)
👩🏻‍🏫老師的小提醒：
1️⃣報名年級以現在年級「一年級」做勾選，不要自動「升級」。
2️⃣七八月暑期校車只有早上和四點半的班次。課外照顧和營隊報名欲搭校車要先確認時間，選好正確的梯次，七、八月皆要填寫清楚校車資訊。🌟八月校車僅提供全期報名，無法選週次🌟
3️⃣七月暑期課外照顧班只收「全期」，不能選週參加。但可以同時報名學校的七月營隊課程。如果孩子同時報名學校七月暑期課外照顧班和七月營隊，學校會計算費用，將重複的部分扣除。
4️⃣八月暑期輔導課（8/4-8/29），八月課程會由張老師和Teacher Adam上課。八月課程張老師會開始指導孩子寫作，建議孩子參加八月暑輔課程。
5️⃣八月不會有回家作業，因此不建議參加16:30-18:00 課後班，四點半後的課後會併班，活動以看影片、看顧孩子為主，學習性質較低。
6️⃣開學日期為9/1星期一。
7️⃣繳費單會統一印製。（5/6星期二-5/11日繳費）

Dear Parents,

Today's homework is to be completed in homework class.

If your child doesn't finish they should not finish at home. They can continue in tomorrow's homework class and catch up on Friday if needed. I did this to spare the children from having a lot of pages on Friday.

No homework at home this week is to ensure that their time at home is dedicated to their Chinese exam review.

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

We have reached the end of our review classes and the Mid Term Exam is upon us tomorrow morning. I have been pleased with the knowledge retained by the class and am confident of some good results tomorrow.

Please help your child review tonight. I suggest they are quite selective with their review, covering areas where they are weakest. It is important for them to get as much rest as possible to be able to come to school as fresh and ready to go as they can.

Here are the links to the online quizzes to save you digging back through the post timeline:

U3.1: The Ant and The Grasshopper
https://quizizz.com/join?gc=35842692

U3.2: The Clever Monkey
https://quizizz.com/join?gc=47377028

U3.3: Poetry Collection
https://quizizz.com/join?gc=15919748

U3.4: The Cow and The Tiger
https://quizizz.com/join?gc=04909700

author: Dir. Chen
content_raw:
今年的世界閱讀日的好書交換活動已經啟動囉!
4/1 到4/18是第一階段的收書活動，家長們可以和孩子一起看看家裡的童書收藏中，是否有些是可以帶來學校和其他人分享的呢? 之後在第二階段的換書活動期間孩子可以自己去從別的同學帶來的書中挑選有興趣的書帶回家喔!

每個小朋友可以帶來1-5本書 (中英皆可)，詳細的條件和辦法請參考第二張照片(活動辦法) 。請在4/18以前讓孩子把書帶來，於午休時間帶去1樓幼兒活動室。每收到一本書，我們會發給孩子一張「換書券」，4/30當天憑券換書，同時右聯可撕下投入摸彩箱，參加抽獎🎟️，請務必保管好「換書券」並寫上班級姓名喔～😊

希望家長鼓勵孩子踴躍參加，讓孩子帶來的書集結成書香寶庫，在4/30當天快樂尋寶大豐收!

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

During our writing review class today it was clear that some of the children are still struggling with formatting thank you notes. I have produced this guide to help with further review. The body of a thank you note can be longer than this example, but this guide shows the formatting needed.

Remember: Date, Who, Body Ending, You

NB: 'Thank You Note' and 'Rhyming Sentences'  were our two writing topics this semester and both could appear on the Mid-Term Exam.

Tr. Adam.

author: Dir. Chen
content_raw:
歡迎各位家長前來觀賞2025年的育才年度重點活動：英語歌曲競賽!
請您注意並配合下列提醒:
1. 請參考程序表並且依照您孩子表演的時間進場觀賞。
   程序表所列的中場休息時間就是讓前一年級的家長退場，下一個表演年級 的家長入場的時段。請家長們把握時間。
2. 場內嚴禁帶入飲料和食物，請您進入前先處理掉。
3. 家長請勿上樓。
4. 孩子在場內時，請勿靠近拍照或說話，以免影響秩序和進行中的表演。
5. 輪到您孩子班級表演時，可以到前面的攝影席照相。請勿使用自拍棒或是高舉攝影設備擋住後面的視線。除非您班上到場的家長人數不多，每位學生以一位家長到攝影席為原則。
您就是孩子們最好的榜樣! 謝謝您的配合!
希望大家好好享受孩子們的演出，有個歡樂的時光!

author: Teacher Patty
content_raw:
----------
CLASS EVENT

🎆英語歌曲比賽 💃🎙🕺
March 28, 2025
7:00 AM to 1:00 PM CST
----------

❤️ 3/28(五) 上午，當天請先在家裡吃早餐，7:30前要到學校，請不要遲到了! 我們會帶孩子步行到永和國父紀念館（預計7:45準備出發，逾時不候）。家長直接到永和國父紀念館找位子，等孩子到場即可。（家長座位區在一樓，一年級孩子的休息區在二樓，提醒您二樓沒有開放，請不要到樓上來找孩子喔！🙏🏻）

🧡 比賽地點在永和國父紀念館，當天開放家長參觀，自由參加。（🔔小叮嚀🔔永和國父紀念館內禁帶任何的飲料（含水）或食物入場，請家長留意。比賽時拍照或攝影，請勿使用自拍棒。）

💛 服裝 : 綠色班服（衣服請紮在褲子裡）＋育才夏季綠色運動短褲＋白底綠條紋襪＋白色運動鞋。
👦🏻男生髮型 : 頭髮梳順或是噴髮膠抓一下造型。到學校後，我們有準備一次性染髮噴劑，會幫男孩噴一些在頭髮上。回家用洗髮精洗淨就可以囉！
👧🏻女生髮型 : 如圖，短頭髮的女生請綁半頭的公主頭，長頭髮女生綁高馬尾。今日會讓女生帶一個銀色蝴蝶結回家。週五請家長讓孩子直接綁好頭髮和蝴蝶結來學校。如果需要協助綁頭髮，請讓孩子7:15前到校，這樣時間會比較充裕。

💚 當天家長可以先在家中幫孩子化妝，以淡妝為主（自由選擇）。所有的妝髮設計都是為了讓孩子比較有臨場感，讓孩子認真看待這次比賽，妝髮不會影響比賽結果，如果孩子很排斥妝髮造型，不想要做造型也沒有關係喔！ 

💙 週五的氣溫有些下降，早上請讓孩子將禦寒的服裝穿在外面，不要穿長袖在我們的班服內，這樣比較方便孩子直接穿脫。另外，也請您幫孩子準備育才手提袋（或一個大袋子），方便讓孩子裝換下來的服裝，避免遺失。
   
💜比賽結束後，我們一樣會步行回學校用午餐，當天下午依照課表正常上課，有課輔和才藝班。

孩子最近十分努力練習，我和外師都可以感受到您與孩子的用心，感謝家長各方面的協助，相信這個星期五會讓孩子留下一個十分美好的回憶🥰

author: 思尹老師 Rita
content_raw:
Dear 綠班家長早安👋:
四月份即將迎來世界閱讀日📖，學校也規劃了一連串的閱讀活動，讓孩子體驗喔~

下週是全校的「好書交換活動」，關於收書的規定請詳讀附件內容（如照片ㄧ）
💐收書時間:4/1~4/18午休時間
💐收書地點:教務處
收到書後，我們會發給孩子「換書券」，4/30當天憑此換書，右聯可撕下投入摸彩箱，參加抽獎🎟️，(如照片二)，請務必保管好「換書券」並寫上班級姓名喔～😊

🐝照片三是低年級閱讀挑戰活動（如照片三），老師今天上課也會跟孩子詳細說明，並讓孩子確實收好活動單（八開大小）其中，每格任務都要完成✅（要有畫圖✍️或拍照呈現）才算達成任務哦！

任務時間：到4/30止，老師會擇優頒發小獎狀並展示成果^ ^
歡迎家長陪同孩子到圖書館📚完成任務吧💪

（‼️如超過繳交期限或是紙張遺失就失去參加資格囉⋯⋯‼️）

1. 本週五的英語歌曲比賽，我們是安排在上午場，因為時間因素，請讓孩子在家就先將早餐吃完。🌟這個星期五請在七點半前到校 ！（我們7:45準備出發，逾時不候）🌟
2. 除了到班上協助妝髮的家長外，其他要到場為孩子加油打氣的家長們，請直接前往永和國父紀念館『卡位』，現場座位有限，先搶先贏。（家長八點半前抵達即可。）
3. 永和國父紀念館內禁帶任何的飲料（含水）或食物入場，請家長留意。
4. 比賽時拍照或攝影，請勿使用自拍棒。
5. 當天的妝髮注意事項，老師明日會再公告。

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

Please find the online quiz homework linked below:

https://quizizz.com/join?gc=54569784

This unit test has some difficult concepts, but I've been pleased with performances in class. This homework will help for the children prepare for the test on Monday morning.

Currently, there are fewer classes than usual due to our Singing Contest practices. The Sunny Boy review worksheet was started in class, but was not finished by all of the children in the limited time allowed. I have attached the answer key to this post so that students can check their worksheet as part of their "Review English" homework. This answer key will allow them to check for themselves as part of their review.

Have a lovely weekend,

Tr. Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

There are two rather difficult areas of study in out next unit.

Grammar: Pronouns
Phonics: The sounds of -ed

I have set a comprehensive pronoun packet for homework. It contains all of the pronoun material that is on our syllabus. There is a lot there and I understand if some/most of the children find it tough. We have just started this unit and will be covering the grammar much more next week. This packet is to help the students get a head start over the weekend to try and learn some of the ideas before our grammmar classes. It is not to check that they are perfect now.

For the purposes of 'The Sounds of-ed' in Phonics. I recommend this video which covers the subject well.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Dsd0eFgU0m8

The children will need to be able to identify which of the three sounds of -ed are being used on the test.

For example:

Which word has the same sound as '-ed' in expected?
a. shocked      b. shamed     c. ended

This is a difficult skill to learn as there are lot of letters associated with each sound.

In summary:
If the base (or root) word ends in 't' or 'd' we use the 'ed' sound.
If the base word ends in 'k', 'ck', 'c', 'f', 's', 'x', 'p', 'sh', 'ch',  or 'ph' we use the soft t sound for -ed.
If the base word ends with a different 'noisy' sound we use the hard d sound for -ed.

The video covers this information well.

There is not a lot of time for this unit and some will be spent preparing for our singing contest. Therefore, in order to score highly on this unit test, the children will have to work extra hard to try and remember the above information, the grammar, and all of our usual spelling, vocabulary, and high frequency words.

Anyone in the class can speak to me at break, lunch, or homework time if they need more help with any part of this.

Enjoy your weekend.
Tr. Adam

author: 思尹老師 Rita
content_raw:
綠班家長午安：
四月份將進入🌍育才閱讀🈷️，我們將提供多元活動來提升孩子閱讀能力～
👸4/10（四）「與作家有約」，我們邀請到 🕊️欖仁媽媽 胡致莉 來跟小朋友見面。由欖仁媽媽主持的《欖仁媽媽說故事》Podcast，透過好玩有趣的方式，讓孩子從小學習關心我們的周遭環境，而這也是第一個以SDGs(聯合國17項永續發展目標) 為主軸的Podcast節目。

‼️如果家中有作者的繪本（照片二），當天也可以拿來給作者簽名喔～^_^


下面🈶相關的故事連結，🎧選擇孩子喜歡的來聽 ：

🌿3-7歲的小聽眾適合這個播放清單：森林小學系列 https://open.firstory.me/playlists/cl5syhgpn001c01ul5uonfixm 

🧙‍♀️7-12歲喜歡緊張感的可以收聽連載故事：女巫書店 https://open.firstory.me/playlists/clrj6p6f2002t01z3dw2y061i 

🐺🍎喜歡經典改編故事的可以參考這裡： https://open.firstory.me/playlists/clhjcl5jn03cw01xob88e70cf 

📖想要聽單篇簡單故事可以來這個清單： https://open.firstory.me/playlists/cl5syiu69001d01ulffof59uu 

📰想接觸國際新聞的孩子可以聽這裡： （或是在親子天下的有聲app有作者專門錄製的十集兒童新聞） https://open.firstory.me/playlists/cl5syf84f001b01ul1ybk37wy 

📓✍️孩子們如果有煩惱想投書，我們有樹洞可以投遞： https://open.firstory.me/playlists/cl8ng4spp034701ws00wa7g86 

🌲🎒說旅遊系列，則可以參考這份清單： https://open.firstory.me/playlists/cl5sycqe7001a01ul5cb3g0up

Adam.

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

As of today we have finished the first unit of homework for English (3.1) and Math (Numbers to 40).

I have placed the stamp for your signature in both the English and Math WB books. Please sign them to complete the unit.

A 'Corrections' stamp with a red check means that all corrections are completed and 100% is scored for that unit's homework. Well done to the many who have earned this!

A 'Corrections' stamp without a tick means that there are outstanding corrections in our most recent homework that the children have not had time to fix yet. Please fix them this evening.

A red 'Homework Overdue' stamp means that old corrections have still not been fixed. Please encourage your child to complete their corrections before the unit tests this week.

Corrections are an important part of the process for improving as they show the areas where the children need to focus their review.

Tr. Adam

🌟 關於本學期的國語聽寫
🔺為了方便辨識，這個學期一樣會在國語簿旁邊貼上金色膠帶。
🔺這個學期開始，我們聽寫都考語詞或是成語，請確實復習國語課本，甲本、乙本、國語課堂練習和筆記簿。
🔺為了訓練孩子檢查的能力，這學期的聽寫考試，我們會留三到五分鐘的時間，讓孩子翻開國語課本(只能看國語課本)，把不會的字、漏寫的字或是寫錯的字用藍色擦擦筆補上，只要藍色擦擦筆的字寫正確，就不會扣分。
🔺聽寫一樣每課考十題，最後會加上一題加分題，主要是考一字多音或成語造詞，一樣也要用藍色擦擦筆寫。

🌟建議在家中也可以用上述的方式，來訓練孩子自我檢查和找答案的能力🙏

Students have been issued new English WB and Math WB books today. I have taught the homework to the class because there were no standard Math or English classes today.

Tr. Adam.

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Next semester there will be a larger focus on writing independently.

A picture dictionary is a great resource to help the children find the spelling of words for themselves.

They come is two types:

The Usborne Picture Dictionary presents the words in ABC order.

The Oxford Children's Picture Dictionary presents words in categories.

The ISBN numbers for these two books are below:
Oxford: 9780194662208
Usborne: 9781474986809

There is a small number of these books at school, but access to them is shared between classes.

If you are interested in purchasing one for your child, it will be a useful resource for them to use in school next semester and into grade 2.

Here are some links I found to the books, but there are likely cheaper options in the second hand market.

Usborne:
https://www.eslite.com/product/1001294887639067?srsltid=AfmBOoqCR482X1CyUDS0HMa6HccgDR_GR6tsWGLBRwqwzk2NHqUx4XEa

Oxford:
https://www.sanmin.com.tw/product/index/013107015

Purchasing either of these books is not mandatory, just a possible way to help your child have easy access to a useful resource during classes next semester.

Many thanks,

Tr. Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Today I will be sending home the winter vacation homework.

The first piece is called "Book Bingo". This is the homework set by the school that all classes will complete. It is a bingo card designed to encourage students to read different types of English books over the holiday.

Please sign your name or initials over each completed square on the paper, and I will award Dojo points in February for each square completed. 

The second piece is listed as "Optional Homework". This is a series of Grammar exercises based on the new material we will cover in semester two. The children will receive copies, but I have attached a larger file to this message with some guidance/teaching about each topic in the homework packet.

This homework is optional and does not need to be completed. However, it will help the children prepare for next semester and it would be great if they could try to complete some or all of it. If they are unable, that is ok, as we will be studying all of this material properly next semester.

Many Thanks for your efforts over this first semester.  

Enjoy your holidays and "xin nian kuai le",

Teacher Adam

Today I will be sending home a copy of the lyrics to the song Try Everything by Shakira. This song features in the movie Zootopia.

Any practice the children can get over the winter break singing this song and beginning to learn the lyrics will help us when formal practice begins next semester.

Here is a link to the song: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jpqV3dzYOgk&pp=ygUOdHJ5IGV2ZXJ5dGhpbmc%3D

Thank You.
Tr. Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

I have been invited by the school to design and run a new after school program beginning from next semester.

It will be held on Thursday evenings between 4:30 and 6:00pm.

I designed it to combine my passion for performance with essential presentation skills that will help the children in school activities and classes going forward. It will be fun and interactive, with students speaking for the majority of the time, rather than the teacher.

This will give them many more opportunities to practice their speaking, reading, and teamwork skills.

This course will also boost a lot of their language skills such reading fluency and intonation, phonics skills, information retention, and memorization. They will gain more confidence with their reading and speaking in the process.

Additionally, they will be able to work in groups with students from other classes and grades.

I have attached a PDF copy in English that contains more information if you would like to know more. There is also a Chinese copy available from the school office.

Finally, If you know of any families in other classes who may also be interested in this course, please feel free to share the .pdf attached.

Thank you for your continued support.

Enjoy your weekends.

Tr. Adam

Congratulations to Ernest, Abbie, and Murphy for scoring 100% on our Math Final Exam.

Your children will be bringing home their exam papers this evening.

Please return the signed exams on Monday.

Have a good weekend.

Tr. Adam :)

I have prepared a study guide for the Final Exam.

This covers all parts of the exam on Tuesday.

The document contains everything your child will need to know. Please use it to ensure that they understand each section, especially grammar which still causes problems for some and is worth a lot of points in the exam.

There are questions about the stories on this exam. This is different from the Mid-Term exam.

Enjoy your weekends,

Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

Today's Grammar w/s homework is due on Monday (12/23).

It is 7 pages long, but doesn't require any sentence writing to complete. The children need to circle, check, or underline correct sentences, or write in the correct punctuation.

For those with a good understanding of our grammar concepts, the homework will be quick to complete and can be handed in tomorrow if it is finished early.

For those who cannot complete these pages alone, this will give them a good indication of which areas they need to focus on in their review.

I won't be explaining this homework to the children today, think of it as a 'homework test'. I will teach a full recap review of this homework on Monday, and we will visit each of these grammar concepts in classes next week.

-------------------------------------------------------------

For the final exam, students need to be able to:

- Identify the subject and predicate of a sentence

- Know if a sentence is 'declarative' (a telling sentence with a period) or 'interrogative' (a question with a question mark)

From our work before the Mid-Term Exams, they need to be able to:

- Identify nouns and verbs in sentences.

- Know that a sentence begins with a capital letter and ends with a punctuation mark.

------------------------------------------------------

The average score in our recent U2.3 unit test was above 92%. (We started the year with an average of 72%) This is great progress! One final push to the exams and I'm sure there will be a lot of super scores to celebrate in the class.

Thank you for your continued support.

Adam

🎄♟玩具分享活動🪀🎎
配合國語和生活課程，我們將舉辦玩具分享活動。透過介紹自己的玩具，與他人一起遊戲，來訓練孩子口語表達、團隊合作及分享的能力。以下有幾點注意事項：
☑ 12/25(三)當天帶一樣玩具 (為避免干擾學習，分享的玩具當天帶來，不要提前帶來!!)
☑ 攜帶的玩具請以書包或是育才側背袋裝得下為主，請不要帶太大的玩具。
☑ 不要帶電動，太貴重或太多細小配件的玩具，避免分享過程中不慎破壞或遺失。
☑ 如果攜帶的物品不適合在教室內玩，例如球類，那就只能讓孩子展示及介紹。

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

I have been messaged by some of you about a potential hacking problem in RazKids.

I take this kind of issue very seriously as trust in digital platforms is essential for modern life.

If your child has unexpectedly lost RazKids stars, please let me know and I can restore them to you.

Also, if you would like a text password instead of the pictograms currently in use, please message me privately with the password you would like to use and I will set it up for you.

It is a shame that we have to resort to this, and I ask for your help in identifying which student is behind this. One of your children has purposely broken / hacked into other students' accounts. This would be illegal in the adult world. If it happens again it will become a major issue involving the school administration.

I will speak to the students about this during homework class today.

I apologise on behalf of the student in question for those affected.

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents, 

This year for Christmas we will have a Secret Santa, where each child will receive a gift from another child at random.  We need each child in the class to buy a present of around the value of $300-$500. Please ask your child to bring it into school and give it to the homeroom teacher.  

On Christmas Eve (December 24th) we will exchange these gifts. Please can you make sure if your child is a girl then to buy a gift for another girl or if your child is a boy, please buy a gift for a boy. We hope this event will help the children appreciate the joy of giving to each other.

Thank you, 
Teacher Adam

👩🏻‍🏫🌈明天（11/27 週三）的公開觀課是在上午第三、四節,共兩節課,英文課在上午午第三節,中文課上午第四節,欲參加的家長在 10:20 到校即可,班上的公開觀課課程會在中午 11:50 結束。緊接著就是孩子午餐的時間,老師們無法立即與您詳談,如有需要可以再跟老師約時間!另外,由於教室空間較小,我們只能在教室後方排放圓板凳,最多只能排 15 張左右,換句話說,只有部分的家長可以進到教室裡面,其餘家長須站在教室外觀課,因此,每位孩子一位家長代表參加即可,不方便參與,也沒有關係,學校會全程錄影,之後,您還是可以看到孩子的課堂表現! 當天為正常上課時間,校園沒有開放停車。🌈

The Frog Questions homework is for students who did not complete the work in class this morning.

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear parents,

There is an opportunity for your child to submit a piece of writing for the school magazine. I will be collecting submissions and working closely to develop the writing skills of any student who presents a piece of writing for the magazine.

The topic we are covering is food. We will be writing a piece of realistic fiction based on the title: The Food in my Fridge.

Students will need to write a short (50 word) story over three paragraphs. I have attached documentation that will help with this task.

In addition, please provide 5 photographs of your child making, eating, or writing about the food. 

Please submit the first draft by Monday, December 9th, 2024 at the latest. The earlier it is submitted, the more time I can spend working with your child improving their story and their overall writing.

If you have further questions, please ask.

Teacher Adam

author: Teacher Patty
content_raw:
明天我們要考國語第一課的聽寫，國字的聽寫和注音有些不同。除了基本的生字和語詞外，老師還會考孩子生字的部首、第一筆畫和總筆畫。同時也會請孩子練習用第一課生字來造詞（造詞如果遇到沒有學過的字，直接寫注音就好了！）
所以，今天請家長協助孩子複習國語課本（複習生字、部首、總筆畫和第一筆畫）和國語課堂練習（上面有很多造詞）

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Tomorrow is the first Mid-Term exam for your children.

Times:

08:30am -> 09:20am (English)
09:30am -> 10:20am (Math)

Please be on time for school tomorrow. Between 7:30 and 8:00 I will be in the classroom taking questions and giving advice to any students who come to me and ask for it.

Between 8:00 and 8:30 we will be preparing for the beginning of the exams. They will start and end on the school bell.

Good luck to all.

---------------------------------------------------

Please see below for a summary of my Homework Class. This is to avoid things being lost between the time I tell your children, and when they tell you.

---------------------------------------------------

For exam preparation tonight, I have prepared another online quiz, please see the QR Code or link below:

https://quizizz.com/join?gc=96470697

Outside of this activity, if you are going to review with your child, focus on the areas that they struggle with the most.

I recommend using our previous unit tests in the green folder to find which parts are more difficult for your child and focus the review on these areas.

Do NOT memorize the old tests. The questions are different, the formatting is different, the reading is different, the size of the paper is different. It won't help very much.

Do NOT focus on the stories in the My View book. There are NO questions about The Blackout, Henry on Wheels, Look Both Ways, Garden Party, or Click Clack Click.

Instead remember these key areas, as I have been reinforcing all week:

- Adding High Frequency and Vocabulary Words to Gaps in Sentences.

- Identifying Nouns, Verbs, Adjectives, Articles, and Simple Sentences.

- Remembering CAPITAL LETTERS and PERIODS!

- Reading short stories and answering questions by copying sentences directly from the story.

- Writing simple sentences about a picture:
                   - I see a ______.
                   - The ____ is by the ____.

- Using number bonds correctly.
- Writing Fact Families correctly.
- Identifying if a question is addition (+) or subtraction (-).
- Checking all your numbers in an answer match properly.

FINALLY:

Get plenty of sleep tonight, rest, prepare in your own way. You don't NEED to complete any of the worksheet packets, they are there to help you!

I'll see you all tomorrow :)

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear 1-Sage Parents,

The first Mid-Term Exam is approaching, and we are well underway with our review lessons.

I have started to send home Review Homework (20 sides of activities), and we will also be completing smaller packets of activities in some of our review classes. The homework will be set each day until Thursday, with the Exam on Friday.

In the exam students will be expected to:
•	Spell 15 spelling words (selected randomly from all four stories).
•	Listen and identify CVC words and initial consonant sounds.
•	Complete cloze sentences with High-Frequency and Vocabulary words.
•	Identify nouns, verbs, and adjectives within a sentence.
•	Identify simple sentences versus fragments.
•	Read two new pieces of text and answer comprehension questions in sentences.
•	Correct/Fix incorrect sentences.
•	Write sentences about a picture.
•	Add an adjective to a sentence.

Each of these skills will be covered in detail during our review lessons, but any additional practice that can be done at home will also help.

Thank you for your continued support and efforts with your children at home.


Teacher Adam.

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Halloween is on its way...

Here is a letter from the Grade 1 teachers explaining what is needed for the Halloween Party.

-----------------------------------------------------

2024 Halloween Party

Dear First Grade Parents, 

	
The teachers of first grade will be hosting this year’s Halloween party on the 5th floor in the morning, and trick or treating will be in the afternoon on Thursday the 31st of October.   
Please make sure your child comes to school dressed in their Halloween costume.  We will have a best costume competition for each class, as well as a variety of Halloween games. 

Your child is encouraged to dress up in a costume, but please NO TOY WEAPONS as this can lead to issues between children. 

We would like to ask for parents to bring in Halloween treats and give them to your homeroom teacher before the event on Thursday.  These candies will be used as prizes for dressing up, classroom games, and as treats for the trick or treating around the school.  Other small novelty items for boys and girls would be welcome such as stickers or pencils.  If you would like to bring in some treats for the children, then please give them to your child's homeroom teacher before the 31st.  

Thank you and Happy Halloween!


Yours Spookily,
                                                     First Grade Teachers!

author: Teacher Patty
content_raw:
爸爸媽媽晚安😊

明天早上我們將施打流感疫苗，廠牌為國光，老師會依照之前家長簽署的同意書，安排孩子去打針。以下有幾點提醒：
🌟🌟🌟1. 明天要打針的孩子一定要帶健保卡。🌟🌟🌟
2. 如果孩子身體不適或體溫太高，現場醫護人員認為不適合施打，老師會發下補接種通知單，讓家長可以帶孩子到外面的醫療院所施打。
3. 如果孩子很怕打針，情緒太激動😅老師也不會勉強孩子一定要施打，一樣會發下補接種通知單，讓家長帶孩子到外面施打。
4. 因為明日全校要施打流感的師生較多，所以不一定會當天歸還健保卡和發下補接種通知單，在此先跟家長說明一下。

🌟 另外，關於中文作業的部分，原訂週三老師出的中文作業，我們會直接順延到星期五，如果孩子要先寫也可以！考試的部分，明天會先考國語第四課考卷和國語第五課聽寫。數學第三單元延到下週再考。

感謝家長的協助🙏🏻

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Please spend some time this weekend making sure that all corrections in each of the three homework books are completed. Many students are doing really well with this each day, but some have a number of corrections still to complete.

Look for red and blue pen marks and folded over page corners to indicate where corrections are.

I will be doing the final book checks for the unit next Wednesday. On that day, the Math and English WB books will be stamped to show a place for parents to sign at the end of the unit. If corrections are not completed, a 'Homework Overview' stamp will be used instead.

I will talk to you more about the stamps next week.

The homework on Tuesday evening will officially be for doing corrections, but completing it early will help the children review their mistakes and knowledge gaps as we approach the end of unit 1.2.

I have included an example of how a correction will look as well as the look and location of the stamps that will be present on Wednesday.

Enjoy your weekends

Teacher Adam

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Today the students will take home their first unit test paper.

These need to be signed (my a parent) at the top right of the first page and returned to school.

-------------------------------------------
NB.  Whilst it is important to reflect on the score %, please bear in mind that this is the first test. The score from this test will NOT be used to calculate the overall score for the semester. This is a practice test for the students.

Starting with our next unit test on September 24th, the scores will count. Rest assured, at this stage all of the scores across all classes in the grade are similar.

🔺考卷寫完後，孩子最少要將考卷從頭到尾檢查一次，然後在考卷右上用「畫豎」的方式來記錄自己檢查的次數。如果整張考卷全對，老師會再幫孩子加一分，代表孩子有好好寫自己的考卷。

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
Dear Parents,

Today I will be sending your child home with their Raz-Kids login information.

There is a letter (Chinese/English) and a small login paper. Login details are the same on both letters and the login paper.

After you log in, press 'reading' and then 'go'. This will start a reading placement test.

-----Do Not Worry-----
if your child does not understand this test. It is designed to put the students into the correct reading level.

***If they cannot answer the questions, that is fine!

They will be placed at a low reading level, which will help them more than if they are placed at a high level.

Raz-Kids stories can be used for reading passport homework.

I believe that reading is a vital part of language learning! Raz-Kids is a great way to encourage your child to read. Enjoy exploring the app.

author: Teacher Patty
content_raw:
2024年9月4日 星期四
1️⃣ 背手拉手。（請孩子背國語課本第一課課文，已經會背誦就不用帶課本回家囉！）
2️⃣國習p8-13, p13簽名。（如圖六，請完成國語首冊習作第八頁到第十三頁，我們已經在課堂上討論過內容，請孩子完成。家長在第十三頁，頁碼旁邊簽名。）
3️⃣數練p3-4。(完成數學課堂練習第三到第四頁。)
4️⃣帶一個漱口杯。（下週我們要開始在學校漱口，請幫孩子準備一個塑膠的漱口杯放在學校，不要太大！）
5️⃣收健檢同意書。（如圖一，學生健康檢查通知既同意書有兩張，老師放在聯絡簿最前面，和繳費袋一放一起。有標示孩子姓名的那一張，請家長勾選簽名後，明天繳交給老師，以利後面健康檢查的安排。）
a. English WBp6-7.
b. Math WBp 6.
c. Spelling Sentences. (5-8) 
 
🌟這個星期五我們要考聽寫，聽寫的題目考國語課堂練習和國語筆記簿裡面語詞（如圖二）。國語課堂練習，老師請孩子用黃色螢光筆畫起來的語詞就是要複習，老師可能會考到的語詞（如圖三和圖四）。國語筆記簿上的語詞是我們上課抄寫的，一樣也要複習，如圖五，（小朋友只要寫語詞就好，不一定要畫圖）。請家長安排時間讓孩子複習，今天會先讓孩子帶國語筆記簿回家。

📝9/2～9/6考試進度表📖
9/6(五)國語第一課聽寫

Here is a demo of the form of each potential type of notebook homework this semester.

This homework is to be completed in the homework notebook.

The Math WB and English WB homework should be completed in their respective books.

All three books (Math WB, English WB, and Homework Notebook) should be taken home every day and returned to school the next day.

It is the responsibility of the students to know and understand their homework and to ask during homework class if they are unsure of what they need to do.

Explanations will not be provided after 4:30pm

author: Teacher Patty
content_raw:
2024年9月2日 星期一
1️⃣ 呼朋引伴。（今天發下國語補充教材，簡稱『國補』，如圖1。我們每週都會帶孩子讀一個成語，今天我們讀了第一個成語，在國補p43 呼朋引伴，孩子不用書寫，只要了解成語的意思，如果可以用成語造一個句子會更棒👍🏻 ）
2️⃣國練p3-4。（請確實完成國練p3到4書寫、閱讀和著色。）
3️⃣注音p6-8。（如圖2，注音符號練習簿我們簡稱『注音』，請用鉛筆將注音p6到8寫完，提醒孩子字要寫工整。）
4️⃣數練p1-2。（如圖3，數學課堂練習，簡稱『數練』，今天在課堂上我們已經一起練習過了，請提醒孩子要確實寫完數練p1到2。）
5️⃣收漱口水回條。（上週六到校參加家長日的家長們，老師已經收到您的漱口水回條了！如果您還沒有繳交，請再明日繳給老師，孩子才能開始在學校使用漱口水，感謝協助。）
a. English WBp2-3.
b. Math WBp 1-3.
c. Spelling*3.

爸爸媽媽晚安😊
明天就是我們第一次的小學家長日囉！
明日請您先上五樓參與行政的相關宣導，待五樓活動結束後，您再回班上，並坐在自己孩子的座位上即可。（您今晚可以先問問孩子，他的座位在哪？也可以可以看桌墊上或是資料上的名字，找到孩子的座位）
🌟🌟🌟明日我們會收班費、填寫資料和選舉班級代表，請您明日準備1️⃣班費2000元2️⃣筆（填寫資料和勾選選票用）

感謝協助😘明天見 👋🏻

content_raw:
2024年8月30日 星期五
1️⃣悅讀護照。（每週最少閱讀一本中文課外讀物並寫在悅讀護照上）
🔗如何寫悅讀護照🔗
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1BAXV07RVcys0LUaMziEJ8eafSlAoov1O/view?usp=drive_link
2️⃣物品檢核表打勾。（如圖2，請依照物品檢核表內需要準備的用品，已經準備好的請打勾，還有缺漏的，請在下週五前補齊。）
3️⃣完成國練p2。（如圖3，國語課堂練習我們簡稱國練，請確實完成第二頁的書寫、閱讀和著色。）
4️⃣寫數習p4-5。（如圖4，數學習作簡稱數習，課堂上老師已經引導過孩子，請確實完成第四和第五頁。）
5️⃣明天家長日5，歡迎參加。（家長日活動流程如圖）
a. ABC Practice.
b. Number Practice.
c. Reading Passport.

🌟今天發下新的聯絡簿，這本聯絡簿要使用一整個學期，請提醒孩子妥善保管。
🌟如圖1，聯絡簿最前面有一個透明套，之後老師會發下評量通知單和繳費袋，我們會放在透明套內。請不要取下透明套。
🌟每位孩子的聯絡簿右上角有一個三角邊夾，這個邊夾可以夾老師當日發下的紙本資料，同時當作書籤，避免孩子抄寫時常常跳頁。如果孩子還不太會使用邊夾，您也可以先幫孩子保管，等孩子比較會使用再帶來學校。
🌟如圖6，聯絡簿的最後面貼有這學期的行事曆和課表，如果需要電子檔，請到『一綠參考資料』夾下載。

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1vmrrqPbwW4g4VAt7WPiKle5-Ar5x8NrJ?usp=drive_link
3️⃣準備文具，看Dojo。（如圖一，請為孩子準備一枝藍色擦擦筆、一枝紅色擦擦筆、一枝黃色螢光筆和兩卷雙面膠。）
🌟藍、紅色擦擦筆（摩擦筆）是可以擦掉的藍筆和紅筆，之後我們考試和抄寫筆記會使用到。牌子不限，因為擦擦筆比較貴，建議家長可以幫孩子買可以更換筆芯的廠牌。
🌟黃色螢光筆用來畫重點使用，請為孩子準備『黃色』的螢光筆，廠牌不限，孩子知道如何使用即可。
🌟請準備寬度約1~1.5公分左右寬度的雙面膠兩卷，之後的課程會使用到。
（上述文具用品，請在9/6下週五前讓孩子備齊並帶來學校）
4️⃣明天同樂會。（這個八月孩子很努力適應小學生活，老師答應孩子全班的Dojo總分得到8800分，我們就要開一個小派對，目前已經累積到快一萬分囉！明天的同樂會，孩子可以帶一樣玩具，但請不要準備電子產品、或是室外使用的玩具，和一樣孩子喜歡的零食來學校。我們會安排時間讓孩子同樂！）
Ａ. PE Sprints.
B. Vocabulary.

爸爸媽媽午安😊
上週五，我們在學校進行身高體重和視力的測量。今日老師將測量結果寫在聯絡簿上，如圖一。

如圖二左，如果孩子拿到「身高體重測量結果通知單」，代表孩子可能過重或過輕，通知單上請家長詳讀，簽名後給老師即可。沒有拿到通知到代表身高體重正常👍🏻

如圖二右，如果孩子拿到「學童視力健康檢查結果複檢通知單」，代表孩子的視力可能有問題，請您要在9/23星期一前，帶孩子到醫院或眼科再檢查一次，並請醫生協助填寫「視力健康檢查複檢與矯治回條」，然後將回條繳交給老師。

author: Teacher Adam
content_raw:
PE: Rules Reminder

The weather for our PE class this morning was approaching 36C. So due to high temperatures and some issues with behavior in our previous PE class, I choose to use today's PE class to remind students of the expectations for them surrounding PE.

- Uniform: Appropriate shoes, waterbottle.

- Routine: Leaving the classroom, lining up, listening to instructions, etc.

- Safety
-------------------------------------------------
We watched and discussed two short videos. One about why rules are important, and another about PE safety.

We also practiced preparing for PE class, and starting the class appropriately.

Finally, there was time for some short exercise outside of the classroom.

Regular PE classes will resume next week.

Please ensure your child has safe shoes for PE; sneakers or strong, sporty shoes that cover and support the foot.

author: Teacher Patty
content_raw:
綠班的小朋友好厲害👍🏻已經有人收集滿一張榮譽卡，兌換到小獎狀囉👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻

🏅榮譽卡說明如下🏅
1️⃣如圖三，榮譽卡（綠色）我們放在學校的「抽屜資料夾內」，孩子有好的表現，除了dojo上加分之外，還可以來找老師蓋章。例如：認真寫聯絡簿、中午飯菜吃光光、安靜午休、書寫練習字跡工整等。
2️⃣孩子會利用下課時間，自己來找老師蓋章。整張榮譽卡蓋完章後，老師會送到教務處，幫孩子兌換一張小獎狀。
3️⃣然後老師會發新的榮譽卡給孩子，繼續收集。
4️⃣得到小獎狀的孩子，同時也可以跟張老師選一樣小獎勵。如果孩子選到文具用品，可以帶來學校使用，如果是小玩具，請帶回家玩，不帶來學校囉！
5️⃣孩子會將收集滿的榮譽卡和小獎狀（白色的）帶回家，請家長協助孩子將小獎狀收好。
6️⃣ 10張小獎狀可以帶來學校換一張大獎狀，10張大獎狀可以兌換榮譽章👍🏻
